comments.body: `CopySuite.TestCopyFailsWithManifestList` is expected to fail with this.

> `CopySuite.TestCopyFailsWithManifestList` is expected to fail with this.

Marked as `ExpectFailure`.

Not sure this is related:
```
18:58:20 [github.com/projectatomic/skopeo] ‹pr/origin/417› ./skopeo copy docker://redis oci:test                           1 ↵
FATA[0000] Error initializing destination oci:test:: cannot save image with empty image.ref.name
```
everything else is working :+1:
That is https://github.com/containers/image/pull/318 ; use `oci:$somedir:redis` or something like that.
